title: Jobs — Edit Modal and Job Detail View
description: Add edit functionality for dispatchers and a read-only job detail view accessible by clicking a job card. Job detail shows all fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a job card opens a read-only detail modal showing all job fields
Detail modal shows: title, description, status, assigned driver, scheduled start/end, scheduling note, pickup address, delivery address, driver notes
Edit button in detail modal opens editable form (Admin and Dispatcher only)
Edit form allows changing: title, description, assignedDriverId, scheduledStart, scheduledEnd, schedulingNote, address fields
Submit sends PATCH /api/jobs/:id with updated fields
Job list or board refreshes after successful edit
implementationNotes: Detail modal and edit modal can be two separate components or a single modal with a view/edit toggle
Scheduled datetime fields use datetime-local input and must be converted to ISO string before sending to API
Finnish datetime formatting applies in read-only view (scheduledStart/End already have this pattern elsewhere in the codebase)
assignedDriverId field should be a dropdown populated from GET /api/users?role=Driver
PATCH /api/jobs/:id already exists in the backend
